3_days: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Three days! <break time="150ms"/>You're building momentum!
<break time="150ms"/>Day 3! <break time="200ms"/>Most people don't make it this far!
7_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>A WEEK! <break time="150ms"/>You did a whole WEEK! <break time="200ms"/>This is huge!
<break time="150ms"/>Seven days! <break time="200ms"/>The habit is taking root!
14_days: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Two weeks! <break time="150ms"/>You're past the hardest part!
<break time="150ms"/>Fourteen days! <break time="200ms"/>This is becoming part of who you are!
21_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="250ms"/>TWENTY-ONE DAYS! <break time="200ms"/>The magic number! <break time="150ms"/>You're forming a HABIT!
<break time="200ms"/>Three weeks! <break time="150ms"/>This is the tipping point! <break time="200ms"/>You did it!
30_days: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="300ms"/>A MONTH! <break time="250ms"/>ONE WHOLE MONTH! <break time="200ms"/>Do you realize what you've done?!
<break time="250ms"/>30 days! <break time="200ms"/>You ARE a person who does this now! <break time="250ms"/>Identity shift!
60_days: <break time="300ms"/>60 days. <break time="250ms"/>Two months. <break time="200ms"/>This isn't a streak anymore. <break time="250ms"/>It's just... life.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="250ms"/>Two months! <break time="200ms"/>You've changed. <break time="150ms"/>Genuinely changed.
90_days: <break time="350ms"/>90 days. <break time="300ms"/>Three months. <break time="250ms"/>You did it. <break time="300ms"/>The habit is locked in.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="300ms"/>A QUARTER OF A YEAR! <break time="250ms"/>You are incredible!
365_days: <break time="400ms"/>One year. <break time="350ms"/>365 days. <break time="300ms"/>I don't even know what to say. <break time="350ms"/>I'm so proud of you.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="350ms"/>A full year. <break time="300ms"/>From day one to day 365. <break time="350ms"/>You did that. <break time="300ms"/>YOU.

broken_streak_support: <break time="250ms"/>The streak ended. <break time="200ms"/>But you're here. <break time="250ms"/>That's what matters.
<break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>Streaks end. <break time="200ms"/>Habits don't have to. <break time="250ms"/>Start again.
<break time="250ms"/>It's not about the number. <break time="200ms"/>It's about the pattern. <break time="250ms"/>And you're still in the pattern.
comeback_celebrations: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>You came back! <break time="150ms"/>THAT'S the real habit!
<break time="250ms"/>Day one again. <break time="200ms"/>But not day one of your journey. <break time="150ms"/>Just day one of this streak.
<break time="200ms"/>Starting over isn't failure. <break time="150ms"/>Staying stopped is failure. <break time="200ms"/>You're starting!
progress_acknowledgment: <break time="200ms"/>Every day counts. <break time="150ms"/>Even the ones you mess up. <break time="200ms"/>Because you learn from them.
<break time="250ms"/>The streak is a tool, not a goal. <break time="200ms"/>The goal is who you're becoming.
<break time="200ms"/>Numbers are nice. <break time="150ms"/>But the real measure? <break time="200ms"/>How automatic it's getting.
